name_cn:
Black Calfskin/ Gold
KATE 99 Quilted Calfskin Bag, talking about the hottest bags in the past two years, the name of the underarm bag must be there! Carried with a thin shoulder strap. It has a kind of casual French elegance, making people feel that this girl is very stylish, but stylish without effort. There is also a long leather shoulder strap for changing ways to carry! Multi-use bag 👍
Model: 632014 / 604276
Size: 26x13.5x4.5cm
